chapter_title.ar: بَابُ فَضْلِ صَوْمِ شَعْبَانَ وَ صِلَتِهِ بِرَمَضَانَ وَ صِيَامِ ثَلَاثَةِ أَيَّامٍ فِي كُلِّ شَهْرٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 13 – Merits of the Fasts of Shaban and its relating with Ramazan, and the three Fasts during every month

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/257)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/257)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الصِّيَامِ فِي الشَّهْرِ كَيْفَ هُوَ قَالَ ثَلَاثٌ فِي الشَّهْرِ فِي كُلِّ عَشْرٍ يَوْمٌ إِنَّ اللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى يَقُولُ مَنْ جاءَ بِالْحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُ عَشْرُ أَمْثالِها ثَلَاثَةُ أَيَّامٍ فِي الشَّهْرِ صَوْمُ الدَّهْرِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr who said,

‘I asked Abu Al-Hassanasws about the Fasts during the month, how are these (to be done)?’ Heasws said: ‘Three during the month, in every ten days. Allahazwj Blessed and High is Saying [6:160] Whoever comes with a good deed, he shall have ten like it – three days during the month is Fasting for the whole time’.
en.sarwar: 7. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn abu Nasr who has said the following: “I asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about fasting during a month. He replied, ’It is three days every month, one day in every ten days. Allah, the most Blessed, the most High, says, “One who does a good deed receives tenfold reward.” [6:151] Three days of fasting every month is like fasting all the time.’”
